opinion.h4: IN RE RYAN. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF HAWAII. No. 748. Decided March 1, 1965.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
The motion to dispense with printing the jurisdictional statement is granted. The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
opinion.h4: MASON v. MIDWESTERN GAS TRANSMISSION CO., 380 U.S. 124 (1965)
opinion.p: 380 U.S. 124 MASON ET UX. v. MIDWESTERN GAS TRANSMISSION CO. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF ILLINOIS. No. 759. Decided March 1, 1965.
Charles A. Bane, Justin A. Stanley and James E. Knox, Jr., for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
